faqs.answer: Mouse extermination services in Richmond typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We use a comprehensive approach including thorough inspection, strategic trap placement, entry point sealing, and sanitation recommendations.
